name: Forms
description: A fully GUI-driven tickets and applications system for RedBot. No web dashboard — everything happens inside Discord.
author: emenblade
install_msg: Load with `[p]load forms`, then run `[p]forms setup` to configure.
end_user_data_statement: This cog stores application answers, ticket transcripts, and per-user state linked to Discord user IDs. Data can be deleted on request via `[p]mydata forgetme`.
